name: Fluss Hook Event Logger
description: Log all OpenClaw hook events to Apache Fluss for real-time analytics

username.description: Fluss SASL username (optional, enables SASL auth when set with password)

password.description: Fluss SASL password (optional, enables SASL auth when set with username)

tablePrefix.description: Table name prefix for hook event tables (e.g. hook_ creates hook_agent_end, hook_session_start, etc.)

batchSize.description: Max buffered rows per table before flush

autoCreateTable.description: Auto-create Fluss database and tables if not exists

bucketCount.description: Number of buckets for table distribution
